title: Chrysalis
description: Flying past the boundaries of what you can do with a Minecraft library mod!
body:
![Chrysalis Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sydokiddo/chrysalis/fabric-main/images/mod_logo.png)
![Header](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sydokiddo/chrysalis/fabric-main/images/header.png)

![Chrysalis](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sydokiddo/chrysalis/fabric-main/images/mod_icon.png)

![About](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sydokiddo/chrysalis/fabric-main/images/about.png)
![Header](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sydokiddo/chrysalis/fabric-main/images/header.png)

Chrysalis is a library mod for [NeoForge](https://neoforged.net/) 1.21.4 with built-in features to assist with mod development and to make modding a bit more accessible for developers!

For more information about Chrysalis, please check out the [Wiki](https://github.com/Sydokiddo/chrysalis/wiki)!

_Do note that the wiki is slightly outdated, so information presented on there might not be fully accurate to the current version!_

![Features](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sydokiddo/chrysalis/fabric-main/images/features.png)
![Header](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sydokiddo/chrysalis/fabric-main/images/header.png)

Currently, Chrysalis has quite a few helpful features and utilities:

- Un-hardcoded various mechanics into an easy-to-use data-driven tag system! This includes various things such as piglin bartering items, nether portal base blocks, iron golem repairing materials, chorus plant base blocks, and more!

- A good amount of utility methods and classes to assist with the creation of various features!

- A dynamic structure-specific music system, mob bucketing system, camera shake system, custom weighted splash text system, and more!

- Various admin-only items to help make play-testing a bit more convenient for developers, and a few new additional commands alongside that!

![FAQ](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sydokiddo/chrysalis/fabric-main/images/faq.png)
![Header](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sydokiddo/chrysalis/fabric-main/images/header.png)

**Q: What Minecraft version is this for?**

>A: This library is made for Minecraft 1.21.4, and I will not be porting it to any older versions!

**Q: Is there a Fabric version?**

>A: No, this mod is and will remain exclusive to the NeoForge mod loader and I won't be supporting other mod loaders.

---

*This project utilizes the [Chrysalis License](https://github.com/Sydokiddo/chrysalis/blob/main/LICENSE), which can be viewed by clicking on the blue text!*
